when.anthropic-skills:pptx: Pitch deck production or slide-based investor presentations that may later be mirrored to Google Drive or Slides.
when.anthropic-skills:pdf: Data room documents and investor reports that should remain auditable in-repo before external mirroring.
when.anthropic-skills:docx: Investor update drafts, founder communications, or formal letters that can be mirrored into Google Docs.

when.anthropic-skills:xlsx: Financial models, runway trackers, and investor pipeline spreadsheets that may be mirrored into Google Drive.
when.anthropic-skills:pdf: Monthly financial reports and board-ready summaries for external sharing.

when.anthropic-skills:docx: Formal PRDs or product specs intended for engineering or stakeholders, with Google Docs mirroring when collaboration is required.
Architecture decision records and technical specs that may need editable Google Docs copies for review.
